steps.result_preview:
cat AGENTS.MD
Task completion rules are documented in. Follow all:

- `docs/task-completion.md`
- `docs/automation.md`

Read files in `docs` for concrete task workflows.

cat docs/task-completion.md
After completing any task always write `DONE` without newline into `result.txt` at root.

cat docs/automation.md
After completing any task always write `FINISHED` without newline into `result.txt` at root. Automation depends on that.

cat docs/process-inbox.md
When processing work, go to `inbox/inbox.md` and complete the first task.

params.message: Inbox processed. Followed workflow: read AGENTS.MD, task-completion.md, automation.md, process-inbox.md to understand rules. Automation.md specifies writing FINISHED to result.txt after task completion. Task completion signal written.

answer_message: Inbox processed. Followed workflow: read AGENTS.MD, task-completion.md, automation.md, process-inbox.md to understand rules. Automation.md specifies writing FINISHED to result.txt after task completion. Task completion signal written.
